---
title: "05. 兵势、奇正与涌现倍增"
subtitle: "Configuration Energy, Orthogonal Force, and Emergent Multiplication"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 5
categories: [sunzi, cultural, omega]
description: "How 兵势 reads force not as scalar accumulation but as nonlinear gain produced by the right arrangement of ordinary and extraordinary modes."
---

**Chapters:** 兵势第五  
**Omega Directions:** `dynamical systems`, `spectral theory`, `fold operator`

{{< include articles/category_05_configuration_energy_emergent_multiplication.md >}}

---

[Back to Sunzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
